sqlMap.select: select * from OthersSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into OthersSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency# #IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency, IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from OthersSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update OthersSuppLW set
IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency = #IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency# IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency = null IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections = #IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections# IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from OthersSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from OthersSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency, IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from OthersSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsAttorHaveInterestInCollectionAgency, IsApplSendCompWithFedFairCollections, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from OthersSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
